description: Lower fragment, verso (secondary use): Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Fragmentary (left side only, long vertical strip). Mentions people such as [...] al-Ḥaver al-Jalīl; Abū l-Qawām; and 'my master Daniel.' The sender seems in distress about something and alludes to unrest or wars (in Hebrew): "...many, many Abyssinians (kushim)... to us, to the sword of the Ishamelites... Egypt, and we pray to God...."
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
